conclusion: The bounded STM32F103 capture/timing self-check passed on real hardware using the unified PA8 -> PB8 loopback path, with capture success encoded onto PA4 for machine-checkable external observation.

anchor_impact.effect: adds bounded live-pass proof for capture/timing-class self-check on the existing unified fixture

what_it_proves: PA8 -> PB8 can support a bounded capture/timing self-check on the current unified STM32 fixture
Firmware can detect capture timing success internally and export the result on PA4
AEL can verify the exported PA4 result through the existing external observe path
